<rdf:RDF
    xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
    xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
    xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
    xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#"
    xmlns:onto="http://iiitb.ac.in/ontology/autonomous#">

  <!-- Classes -->
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="AcademicProgramme">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents an academic programme offered by an institution</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Degree">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a degree awarded to students upon completion of a programme</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="FacultyMember">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a faculty member involved in teaching and research</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Institution">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents an educational institution</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="ResearchArea">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a niche area of research</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="University">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a university</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="#Institution"/>
  </owl:Class>

  <!-- Object Properties -->
  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasDegree">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates an academic programme to a degree</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#AcademicProgramme"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#Degree"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasFacultyMember">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates an academic programme to a faculty member</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#AcademicProgramme"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="involvedIn">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates a faculty member to a research area</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#ResearchArea"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="offeredBy">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates an academic programme to an institution</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#AcademicProgramme"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#Institution"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <!-- Datatype Properties -->
  <owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:ID="hasTitle">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents the title of an academic programme</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#AcademicProgramme"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="xsd:string"/>
  </owl:DatatypeProperty>

  <owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:ID="hasBio">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents the bio of an academic programme</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#AcademicProgramme"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="xsd:string"/>
  </owl:DatatypeProperty>

  <!-- Individuals -->
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="IIITB">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#University"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="IMTechECE">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#AcademicProgramme"/>
    <onto:hasTitle>Integrated M.Tech. (Electronics and Communication Engineering)</onto:hasTitle>
    <onto:hasBio>IIIT-B introduced a 5-year Integrated M.Tech. (I.M.Tech.) programme from 2012 onwards. The Integrated M.Tech. programme is a 5-year integrated programme intended for students who have completed or are completing Plus Two (or equivalent). At the end of five years of the programme, successful students get dual degrees of B.Tech and M.Tech. The students will be taught and supervised by the faculty members with PhD from highly reputed universities of the world and involved in R&D in niche areas of ECE.</onto:hasBio>
    <onto:offeredBy rdf:resource="#IIITB"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="BTechDegree">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Degree"/>
    <rdfs:comment>Bachelor of Technology degree</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="MTechDegree">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Degree"/>
    <rdfs:comment>Master of Technology degree</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="ECEFacultyMember">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#FacultyMember"/>
    <onto:involvedIn rdf:resource="#ECEResearchArea"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="ECEResearchArea">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#ResearchArea"/>
    <rdfs:comment>Niche area of Electronics and Communication Engineering</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <!-- Relationships -->
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="IMTechECE">
    <onto:hasDegree rdf:resource="#BTechDegree"/>
    <onto:hasDegree rdf:resource="#MTechDegree"/>
    <onto:hasFacultyMember rdf:resource="#ECEFacultyMember"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

</rdf:RDF>
